Subject: Congratulations! You Have Won Our Exclusive Prize!

Dear Valued Customer,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as the winner of our annual Global Excellence Award. As a valued member of our community, you are entitled to receive a premium gift pack worth $5,000.

To claim your prize, please verify your account details by clicking the secure link below:

https://secure.globalexcellence.com/claim-prize

Thank you for your continued support. We look forward to celebrating your success.

Best regards,
Global Excellence Awards Team

Dear Valued Account Holder,

Our records indicate potential irregularities with your account activity. To protect your assets, please review the recent transactions and confirm your identity by logging into your account via the secure link below.

https://www.yourbank-secure.com/verify

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in temporary account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team
